backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining UserProfile, Order, and ContactSubmission types with CRUD endpoints, access-control guards (admin/user roles), and in-memory Maps for storage.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (OldUserProfile, OldContactSubmission) into the new schema (NewUserProfile with address/phoneNumber, NewContactSubmission with message, plus empty Orders map).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Samay Pizza rebuild, Home page, Menu page, etc.) to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key contents of every component, page, hook, and config file in the Samay Pizza frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Samay Pizza SPA with title 'Samay Pizza - Best Pizza in Gorakhpur', SEO meta description, and a root div that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (Home, Menu, Order), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders Navbar, Footer, and Toaster in a shared layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Samay Pizza footer component with brand logo, quick navigation links, and contact details (address, WhatsApp, phone, email) on a deep-red background, plus a bottom bar with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar for Samay Pizza with links to Home, Menu, and Order pages, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state and operations (add, remove, update quantity, clear) along with computed totalPrice and totalItems values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and an optional admin token, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Re-exports the useCart hook from CartContext for convenient importing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlaceOrder.ts: Custom hook wrapping a React Query mutation that calls the backend actor's placeOrder method with customer and order details.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom hook wrapping a React Query mutation that submits a contact form via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Poppins and Playfair Display fonts, defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for a deep-red theme, and utility classes for animations, card styles, and scrollbar customization.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Samay Pizza featuring a hero banner with order/WhatsApp CTAs, a features grid, and a food category showcase.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Displays the full Samay Pizza menu organized by category (pizza, Chinese, rice, burgers, snacks) with size selection and add-to-cart functionality using the CartContext.
frontend/src/pages/OrderPage.tsx: Checkout page that shows cart contents, collects customer name/phone/address, validates the form, saves the order to the backend, and opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled order message.
frontend/src/pages/Solutions.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Poppins, Playfair Display), Samay Pizza brand colors (deep red, warm white, cream), shadows, border radii, and plugin setup for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Samay Pizza 3-page food delivery website, including tech stack, brand details, WhatsApp/UPI integration info, image requirements, and a list of implemented features.
